_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of how humans interact with and/or are impacted by AI solutions within the DoD context.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of responsible AI principles and their operationalization, including fairness metrics, explainability methods, human oversight requirements, and AI impact assessment methodologies.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-005 (AG, cosine: 0.581), SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.575).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.576). Shared vocabulary: [ai, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [context, dod, humans, impacted, interact, solutions] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessment, explainability, fairness, human, impact, methodologies] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.878, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of how humans interact with and/or are impacted by AI solutions within" and "Knowledge of responsible AI principles and their operationalization, including f" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.606 ≈ STS 0.576 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [ai, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [context, dod, humans, impacted, interact, solutions]. WIDAI-only: [assessment, explainability, fairness, human, impact, methodologies].
